business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics - LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

positives: No subcontracted drivers or independent contractors indicated.
No DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years.
Fleet is in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations.
GPS tracking / ELD devices are installed in all vehicles.
MVR checks are performed on all drivers at least annually.
Applicant maintains a valid DOT number and MC authority.
CDL licenses are verified for all drivers at time of hire.
Warehouse and service/repair locations are sprinklered.
concerns: CSA BASIC Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold and is currently being addressed.
Prior insurance history reflects 10 to 13 claims annually from 2022 through 2024.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 12 claims in 2022, 13 claims in 2023, and 10 claims in 2024; no cancellations reported.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Nature of Business: Regional trucking and freight logistics - LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Primary commodities hauled by vehicle type: Dry van: general freight, packaged goods. Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Do you have a formal safety program? Yes. Is fleet in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations? Yes. Are GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles? Yes. Are MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually? Yes. Does the applicant maintain a valid DOT number and MC authority? Yes. Are CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire? Yes.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history table shows: 2024 Hanover Insurance Group - 10 claims, no cancellations; 2023 Hartford Financial Services - 13 claims, no cancellations; 2022 Auto-Owners Insurance - 12 claims, no cancellations.
